name: Chocolate Dunking Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine, sugars, and sugar substitute together until light and fluffy.
2. Add vanilla and egg whites; mix at medium speed until creamy, scraping the bowl before and after adding each ingredient.
3. Stir flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt together to blend; add to the creamy mixture and mix at medium speed to combine.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 1 to 24 hours.
5. Return dough to room temperature.
6. Roll out on a lightly floured board to form a 12-inch square.
7. Cut across the dough into 4 equal intervals, creating 3 slices that are 4 inches wide and 12 inches long.
8. Cut each slice into 12 equal portions, measuring 1 inch by 4 inches.
9. Place dough on cookie sheets sprayed with Pam or lined with aluminum foil.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until firm.
11. Remove from oven and cool to room temperature.
Variations:
- Cinnamon Dunkin' Cookies: Omit cocoa. Add 1/4 cup all-purpose flour and 1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon to the dry ingredients. Include lemon flavoring and grated lemon rind with vanilla.
- Lemon Dunkin' Cookies: Omit cocoa. Add 1 teaspoon lemon flavoring and grated lemon rind, along with vanilla. Also add 1/4 cup all-purpose flour to the dry ingredients.
Food exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 93, Fat: 4g, Carbohydrates: 13g, Sodium: 33mg, Protein: 2g
